HELP CENTER

Help & Support

❓ Frequently Asked Questions ›
How do I add a product?

Go to Products → Add Product. Fill in details and click Save.

How are payouts processed?

Payouts are processed every Monday via Bank Transfer or eZ Cash.

What is the platform commission?

8% commission + 5% platform fee on each sale.

🎫 Raise a Ticket
💬 Live Chat
Support Online · Avg reply 2 min
👋 Hello Ashan! How can we help you today?
